note: Fixed set of posts the picker is scored against each round. Keep it fixed so round-over-round scores compare the RULES (query derivation + guardrails), not the posts. Covers both selection modes (title-noun vs Feeling Library) and all three categories. Add rows as the blog grows, but don't churn them. Eval runs use --no-dedup and grade previews WITHOUT saving (don't pollute the real ledger).
